comment.body:
basically, in positive beta environment, investors (not traders!) are selling bonds and buy equitites, or selling equitites and buy bonds.
the are happy about increasing growth, and unhappy about decreasing growth. Market doesn't fear inflation here.

when spx/yields beta is negative, market is concerned about inflation, they are not happy about elevating growth,  they sell equitites due to hightened borrowing cost and squeezed profit margins, and sell bonds as investors want higher returns to offset purchasing power erosion, expecting tight policy.
when growth is slowing, they expect easing: buy bonds, buy equitites beforehand
comment.raw_body:
basically, in positive beta environment, investors (not traders!) are selling bonds and buy equitites, or selling equitites and buy bonds.
the are happy about increasing growth, and unhappy about decreasing growth. Market doesn't fear inflation here.

when spx/yields beta is negative, market is concerned about inflation, they are not happy about elevating growth,  they sell equitites due to hightened borrowing cost and squeezed profit margins, and sell bonds as investors want higher returns to offset purchasing power erosion, expecting tight policy.
when growth is slowing, they expect easing: buy bonds, buy equitites beforehand
